Package com.wip.service

Class TrackingUpdateServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.wip.service.TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
TrackingUpdateService
@Service public class TrackingUpdateServiceImpl extends Object implements TrackingUpdateService
Service implementation for managing tracking update business logic.

Handles the creation, retrieval, and deletion of tracking updates for shipments. Enforces role-based access control, allowing only administrators to add or delete updates, while restricting users to view only updates for their own shipments.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Constructor Details

    • TrackingUpdateServiceImpl

      public TrackingUpdateServiceImpl(TrackingUpdateRepository trackingUpdateRepository, ShipmentRepository shipmentRepository, AppUserRepository appUserRepository)
      Constructs a TrackingUpdateServiceImpl with the required dependencies.
      Parameters:
      trackingUpdateRepository - the repository for tracking update data
      shipmentRepository - the repository for shipment data
      appUserRepository - the repository for user data

  • Method Details

    • addTrackingUpdate

      public TrackingUpdateDto addTrackingUpdate(Long shipmentId, TrackingUpdateDto trackingUpdateDto)
      Adds a new tracking update to an existing shipment and updates its current location.
      Specified by:
      addTrackingUpdate in interface TrackingUpdateService
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the unique identifier of the shipment
      trackingUpdateDto - the tracking update data to persist
      Returns:
      the saved tracking update details
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the user is not an administrator
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the shipment or user is not found

    • getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId

      public List<TrackingUpdateDto> getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
      Retrieves all tracking updates associated with a given shipment.
      Specified by:
      getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId in interface TrackingUpdateService
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the unique identifier of the shipment
      Returns:
      a list of tracking updates ordered by creation time
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the shipment is not found or access is denied

    • getTrackingUpdateById

      public TrackingUpdateDto getTrackingUpdateById(Long updateId)
      Retrieves a single tracking update by its ID.
      Specified by:
      getTrackingUpdateById in interface TrackingUpdateService
      Parameters:
      updateId - the unique identifier of the tracking update
      Returns:
      the tracking update details
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the update is not found or access is denied

    • deleteTrackingUpdate

      public void deleteTrackingUpdate(Long updateId)
      Deletes a tracking update from the system.
      Specified by:
      deleteTrackingUpdate in interface TrackingUpdateService
      Parameters:
      updateId - the unique identifier of the tracking update to delete
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the user is not an administrator
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the tracking update is not found

    • search

      public List<TrackingUpdateDto> search(String keyword)
      Searches for tracking updates using a keyword.
      Specified by:
      search in interface TrackingUpdateService
      Parameters:
      keyword - the search string
      Returns:
      a list of tracking updates matching the criteria

    • getAllTrackingUpdates

      public List<TrackingUpdateDto> getAllTrackingUpdates()
      Retrieves all tracking updates accessible to the current user.
      Specified by:
      getAllTrackingUpdates in interface TrackingUpdateService
      Returns:
      a list of all accessible tracking updates
